summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that PEP is currently testing its Daily 200MA support zone near $148.56. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 28.6%. The asset has recently tested this support 1 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $159.75 and a significant trendline confluence around $156.14 (formed by 5 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
